settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and account settings
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose how you want to be notified about updates and activities.
settings.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Irreversible actions that affect your account.

notificationDescriptions.email: Receive updates about your account and trips via email.
notificationDescriptions.push: Receive real-time notifications on your device.
notificationDescriptions.sms: Receive important alerts via text message.
